value.found_quote: You can enable or disable sandboxing in Antigravity User Settings. Toggle "Enable Terminal Sandboxing" to turn sandboxing on or off.
value.rationale: The page has a section "Enabling Sandboxing" describing how sandboxing can be toggled on or off in Antigravity User Settings, directly matching the claim. It is described as a current feature (though disabled by default), supported on macOS and Linux.
